## Product Brief
1. Diligent helps organizations strengthen governance, manage risk, and meet compliance obligations across the enterprise.
2. Their platform connects board and leadership collaboration with enterprise risk management, audit, and compliance.
3. They offer solutions for centralizing board materials, identifying and monitoring risk, and supporting regulated environments.
